# Edge cases

A paragraph immediately followed by a list (no blank line between):
- item one
- item two

1. A list item containing a fenced block:
   ```bash
   echo "still inside item one"
   ```
2. And a second item after it.

A blockquote containing a table:

> | Key | Value |
> | --- | ----- |
> | a   | 1     |

A hard line break — two trailing spaces —  
keeps this on a new line of the same paragraph.

Unicode and emoji: café, naïve, Москва, 日本語, 😀 📝 ✅.
